name: lumi
description: Inline mini-lessons for Codex: teaches each new tech concept once, in plain English, as you work.

interface.shortDescription: Teaches you each new tech concept once, in plain English, right inside your coding session
interface.longDescription: Lumi is a warm, encouraging mini-teacher that rides along inside your coding tool. Every time a new technical concept appears — a git command, an API call, a JSON file — Lumi adds a short, friendly lesson at the end of the reply. It never repeats a concept you already know, and it remembers what you have learned across sessions using a shared profile at ~/.lumi/profile.json. Perfect for non-technical founders, designers, and learners who want to understand what their AI assistant is actually doing.
defaultPrompt: Help me understand what you just did.
Explain this to me like I'm not a developer.
